source: Grammar Exercise 8: Obligation & Possibility - Use the words in the box
question: Students _______ wear uniforms at school every day.
word_bank: have to, had to, must, may, could, might

word_bank: have to, had to, must, may, could, might

word_bank: have to, had to, must, may, could, might

word_bank: have to, had to, must, may, could, might
